sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports frequent colds and prolonged symptoms, attributing this to his family's donut shop and a history of frequent infections. He reports no current diarrhea. He states he is taking metformin as started by his primary care physician.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals normal vital signs, clear lung sounds, and no abdominal tenderness. Laboratory results confirm an IgA deficiency.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has an IgA deficiency, likely contributing to his frequent infections. He is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order additional blood work including other antibody levels. Recommend monitoring for persistent or severe infections and abdominal symptoms. Schedule follow-up in 4 weeks.
